clinical_notes: First visit. G2P1. History: vaginal delivery 2020, 3.2kg. No significant history. Blood type A+. Pregnancy declaration completed.
Normal exam. First trimester ultrasound done - see imaging report. Estimated due date confirmed 14/05/2025
Morphology ultrasound appointment booked. Patient feels well, no complaints.
Glucose tolerance test prescribed - suspected gestational diabetes. Fasting blood draw at lab.
OGTT result: gestational diabetes confirmed. Patient referred to Dr Martin at obstetric clinic for specialist management. Continuing midwife follow-up in alternation.
BP borderline. Lower limb edema. Proteinuria to monitor. Contacted Dr Martin for advice. Rest recommended.
Called Dr Martin. Unstable BP. Proteinuria. Close monitoring. Patient informed of preeclampsia warning signs: headaches, visual disturbances, epigastric pain.
